data.name: Too many requests. Please try again later.
data.value: Too many requests. Please try again later.

data.name: Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.
data.value: Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.

data.name: Too many sidecar rooms from this address
data.value: Too many sidecar rooms from this address

data.name: Not authorized to manage this share link
data.value: Not authorized to manage this share link

data.name: Not authorized to revoke this share link
data.value: Not authorized to revoke this share link

data.name: Confirmation text does not match username
data.value: Confirmation text does not match username

data.name: Both encryptedSalt and saltNonce must be provided together
data.value: Both encryptedSalt and saltNonce must be provided together

data.name: Invalid salt nonce length, expected 12 bytes
data.value: Invalid salt nonce length, expected 12 bytes

data.name: Invalid base64 encoding for salt or nonce
data.value: Invalid base64 encoding for salt or nonce

data.name: Invalid base64 encoding for wrapped key
data.value: Invalid base64 encoding for wrapped key

data.name: Invalid base64 encoding in epoch key data
data.value: Invalid base64 encoding in epoch key data

data.name: A link with this ID already exists
data.value: A link with this ID already exists

data.name: Cannot add keys to a revoked link
data.value: Cannot add keys to a revoked link

data.name: Valid access grant required for limited-use links. Call GET /api/v1/s/{linkId} first to obtain a grant token, then pass it via the X-Share-Grant header.
data.value: Valid access grant required for limited-use links. Call GET /api/v1/s/{linkId} first to obtain a grant token, then pass it via the X-Share-Grant header.

data.name: Recipient must be an active album member
data.value: Recipient must be an active album member

data.name: Epoch key already exists for this album/recipient/epoch
data.value: Epoch key already exists for this album/recipient/epoch

data.name: Manifest signed by an unknown epoch key for this album
data.value: Manifest signed by an unknown epoch key for this album

data.name: Some shards already linked to a manifest
data.value: Some shards already linked to a manifest

data.name: assetType must be Image, Video, or LiveImage
data.value: assetType must be Image, Video, or LiveImage

data.name: At least one epoch key is required
data.value: At least one epoch key is required

data.name: At least one wrapped key is required
data.value: At least one wrapped key is required

data.name: Each epoch key must have a 24-byte nonce
data.value: Each epoch key must have a 24-byte nonce

data.name: Each epoch key must have an encryptedKey
data.value: Each epoch key must have an encryptedKey

data.name: Each epoch key tier must be 1, 2, or 3
data.value: Each epoch key tier must be 1, 2, or 3

data.name: Each epoch key tier must be less than or equal to accessTier
data.value: Each epoch key tier must be less than or equal to accessTier

data.name: Each wrapped key must have a 24-byte nonce
data.value: Each wrapped key must have a 24-byte nonce

data.name: Each wrapped key must have an encryptedKey
data.value: Each wrapped key must have an encryptedKey

data.name: Each wrapped key tier must be 1, 2, or 3
data.value: Each wrapped key tier must be 1, 2, or 3

data.name: Each wrapped key tier must be less than or equal to accessTier
data.value: Each wrapped key tier must be less than or equal to accessTier

data.name: encryptedMeta must be valid base64 and at least 16 bytes
data.value: encryptedMeta must be valid base64 and at least 16 bytes

data.name: epochKeys must not include the member being removed
data.value: epochKeys must not include the member being removed

data.name: expiresAt must be in the future
data.value: expiresAt must be in the future

data.name: signature must be a 64-byte Ed25519 signature
data.value: signature must be a 64-byte Ed25519 signature

data.name: signature must be valid base64 and non-empty
data.value: signature must be valid base64 and non-empty

data.name: signerPubkey does not match any active epoch sign key for this album
data.value: signerPubkey does not match any active epoch sign key for this album

data.name: signerPubkey must be valid base64 and exactly 32 bytes
data.value: signerPubkey must be valid base64 and exactly 32 bytes

data.name: This endpoint is only available when local authentication is enabled. Contact your administrator.
data.value: This endpoint is only available when local authentication is enabled. Contact your administrator.

data.name: tieredShards contentLength does not match stored shard length
data.value: tieredShards contentLength does not match stored shard length

data.name: tieredShards is required for manifest finalization
data.value: tieredShards is required for manifest finalization

data.name: tieredShards sha256 does not match stored shard hash
data.value: tieredShards sha256 does not match stored shard hash

data.name: tieredShards sha256 must be lowercase hex SHA-256
data.value: tieredShards sha256 must be lowercase hex SHA-256

data.name: tieredShards shardIndex must be contiguous per tier
data.value: tieredShards shardIndex must be contiguous per tier

data.name: tieredShards shardIndex must be unique per tier
data.value: tieredShards shardIndex must be unique per tier

data.name: tombstoneSignature and signerEpochId must be supplied together or both omitted
data.value: tombstoneSignature and signerEpochId must be supplied together or both omitted

data.name: tombstoneSignature must be a 64-byte Ed25519 signature
data.value: tombstoneSignature must be a 64-byte Ed25519 signature

data.name: tombstoneSignature must be valid base64 and non-empty
data.value: tombstoneSignature must be valid base64 and non-empty

data.name: The upload session for this file has expired or was garbage-collected. Start a new upload.
data.value: The upload session for this file has expired or was garbage-collected. Start a new upload.
